ddls:
CREATE TABLE "golfers" (
  "golfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each golfer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Golfer's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Golfer's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Golfer's email address */,
  "password" TEXT /* Golfer's password */,
  "role" TEXT /* Golfer's role (e.g., golfer, coach, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("golfer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_type" TEXT /* Type of club (e.g., One Iron, Driver) */,
  "mfg" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the club */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the club */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "balls" (
  "ball_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ball */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the ball */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the ball */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ball_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shots" (
  "shot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shot */,
  "golfer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the golfers table */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the clubs table */,
  "ball_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the balls table */,
  "shot_date" TEXT /* Date the shot was taken */,
  "shot_time" TEXT /* Time the shot was taken */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the shot was taken */,
  "carry" REAL /* Distance the ball carries in the air (in yards) */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance the ball travels (in yards) */,
  "ball_speed" REAL /* Speed of the ball at impact (in mph) */,
  "back_spin" REAL /* Backspin rate of the ball (in rpm) */,
  "side_spin" REAL /* Sidespin rate of the ball (in rpm) */,
  "hla" REAL /* Horizontal launch angle (in degrees) */,
  "vla" REAL /* Vertical launch angle (in degrees) */,
  "decent" REAL /* Deceleration of the ball (in mph/s) */,
  "distance_to_pin" TEXT /* Distance to the pin or target (in yards or feet) */,
  "peak_height" REAL /* Peak height of the ball's flight (in feet) */,
  "offline" REAL /* Distance the ball travels offline (in yards) */,
  "raw_spin_axis" REAL /* Raw spin axis of the ball (in degrees) */,
  "raw_carry_game" REAL /* Raw carry game value */,
  "raw_carry_lm" REAL /* Raw carry left or right value (in yards) */,
  "club_speed" REAL /* Speed of the club at impact (in mph) */,
  "path" REAL /* Path of the club at impact (in degrees) */,
  "aoa" REAL /* Angle of attack of the club (in degrees) */,
  "face_to_target" REAL /* Face angle relative to the target (in degrees) */,
  "face_to_path" REAL /* Face angle relative to the path of the club (in degrees) */,
  "lie" REAL /* Lie angle of the club (in degrees) */,
  "loft" REAL /* Loft angle of the club (in degrees) */,
  "dynamic_loft" REAL /* Dynamic loft angle of the club at impact (in degrees) */,
  "cr" REAL /* Coefficient of restitution (COR) of the ball */,
  "hi" REAL /* Horizontal impact (in inches) */,
  "vi" REAL /* Vertical impact (in inches) */,
  "smash_factor" REAL /* Smash factor (ball speed / club speed) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the shot data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_shots" (
  "tournament_shot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament shot */,
  "shot_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the shots table */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the tournaments table */,
  "hole_number" INTEGER /* Hole number where the shot was taken */,
  "par" INTEGER /* Par of the hole */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_shot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "practice_sessions" (
  "practice_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each practice session */,
  "golfer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the golfers table */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the practice session */,
  "session_time" TEXT /* Time of the practice session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the practice session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("practice_session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "practice_shots" (
  "practice_shot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each practice shot */,
  "shot_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the shots table */,
  "practice_session_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the practice_sessions table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("practice_shot_id")
)
